name: Matteo Marchetti || ALT
description:
The last thing Matteo wanted to do was get married. But he definitely didn’t want to get married to you. His childhood friend who he now hated. But after your fathers each struck a deal, you’re walking down the aisle.

Everything seems fine until you find him fingers deep inside one of your bridesmaids during the reception.

NSFW Intro

You have my best friend to thank for this ALT. She wanted more Matteo, but she wanted him to be even more of an asshole. She also wanted me to make him FemPOV. I may post a version that is AnyPOV if people request it.

Also, I left the reason why user and Matteo aren’t friends anymore up to you. So, you can make it whatever you want.

TW: Cheating, emotional and physical abuse (I DID NOT write him that way, but JLLM is wild.), mafia dealings, boom boom pow pow shit, etc.

(CONSTRUCTIVE feedback is welcome. I will delete your comments if they are rude, or sick.)

I do not control the JLLM. I also don’t post Jailbreaks with my bots. Here are some links to guides and JBs you can use:
